entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.

Quick Start

Create a new post

More info: Writing

Run server

More info: Server

Generate static files

More info: Generating

Deploy to remote sites

More info: Deployment

entry.title: About
entry.content:
HP 30/30 EXP 3542 RUNE 0
Adventurer ProfileGame Client / Engine

张毅川

Timeinrain · 游戏客户端 / 引擎方向开发

★ ★ ★ ★ ☆

厦门大学腾讯天美独立开发

冒险者 · 张毅川

战斗力: 960

天赋

工程落地

主程 / 客户端 / 引擎

技能

C++UE4 / UE5HLSLRenderDocShaderLabGameplayProfilerRHI / Mobile

Career Quest

Adventure Map

点击地图上的区域进入对应经历篇章；悬浮时会展开快速打字机提示。

学生时代实习阶段工作阶段

:root { --cursor-default: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/default.png") 10 2, auto; --cursor-pointer: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/pointer.png") 10 2, pointer; --cursor-text: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/text.png") 6 24, text; --cursor-help: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/help.png") 10 2, help; --cursor-wait: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/wait.png") 14 14, wait; --cursor-progress: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/progress.png") 10 2, progress; --cursor-crosshair: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/crosshair.png") 15 15, crosshair; --cursor-not-allowed: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/not_allowed.png") 12 12, not-allowed; --cursor-move: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/move.png") 14 14, move; --cursor-resize-x: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/resize_x.png") 14 8, ew-resize; --cursor-resize-y: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/resize_y.png") 12 8, ns-resize; --cursor-resize-nwse: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/resize_nwse.png") 8 8, nwse-resize; --cursor-resize-nesw: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/resize_nesw.png") 8 8, nesw-resize; --cursor-up: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/up.png") 14 4, n-resize; --cursor-pen: url("/img/pixel-medieval/cursors/pen.png") 6 24, crosshair;}html,body { cursor: var(--cursor-default);}a,button,select,summary,label[for],[role="button"],[type="button"],[type="checkbox"],[type="color"],[type="file"],[type="image"],[type="radio"],[type="range"],[type="reset"],[type="submit"],[onclick],.btn,.button,.copy-button,.page-number,.extend,.menus_item,.menus_item_child,#rightside,#rightside *,#pagination *,#nav .site-page,.search-dialog .search-close-button,.local-search-hit-item,.aplayer * { cursor: var(--cursor-pointer) !important;}input:not([type]),input[type="date"],input[type="datetime-local"],input[type="email"],input[type="month"],input[type="number"],input[type="password"],input[type="search"],input[type="tel"],input[type="text"],input[type="time"],input[type="url"],input[type="week"],textarea,[contenteditable=""],[contenteditable="true"],p,li,blockquote,figcaption,caption,td,th,code,pre,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6,.article-title,.article-meta-wrap,#article-container { cursor: var(--cursor-text);}a *,button *,summary *,[role="button"] *,[onclick] * { cursor: inherit !important;}:disabled,[disabled],[aria-disabled="true"],.disabled { cursor: var(--cursor-not-allowed) !important;}.loading,.loading *,.pace,.pace *,[aria-busy="true"],[aria-busy="true"] * { cursor: var(--cursor-progress) !important;}.wait,.wait * { cursor: var(--cursor-wait) !important;}.help,[data-cursor="help"] { cursor: var(--cursor-help) !important;}.crosshair,[data-cursor="crosshair"] { cursor: var(--cursor-crosshair) !important;}.pen,[data-cursor="pen"] { cursor: var(--cursor-pen) !important;}.move,[draggable="true"],[data-cursor="move"] { cursor: var(--cursor-move) !important;}.resize-x,[data-cursor="resize-x"] { cursor: var(--cursor-resize-x) !important;}.resize-y,[data-cursor="resize-y"] { cursor: var(--cursor-resize-y) !important;}.resize-nwse,[data-cursor="resize-nwse"] { cursor: var(--cursor-resize-nwse) !important;}.resize-nesw,[data-cursor="resize-nesw"] { cursor: var(--cursor-resize-nesw) !important;}.up,[data-cursor="up"] { cursor: var(--cursor-up) !important;}

(function () { function createSpark(x, y) { var spark = document.createElement('span'); spark.className = 'pixel-spark'; spark.style.left = x + 'px'; spark.style.top = y + 'px'; document.body.appendChild(spark); window.setTimeout(function () { spark.remove(); }, 700); } document.addEventListener('click', function (event) { if (event.button !== 0) return; createSpark(event.clientX, event.clientY); }, { passive: true }); function initCareerMap() { var board = document.querySelector('.career-map-board[data-career-map]'); var dataNode = document.getElementById('career-map-data'); if (!board || !dataNode || board.dataset.mapReady === 'true') return; var panel = board.querySelector('.career-map-info'); var closeButton = board.querySelector('.career-map-info-close'); var kickerNode = board.querySelector('.career-map-info-kicker'); var titleNode = board.querySelector('.career-map-info-title'); var textNode = board.querySelector('.career-map-info-text'); var widgets = board.querySelectorAll('.career-map-widget[data-map-panel]'); var mapData = {}; var typingTimer = null; var activeKey = ''; try { mapData = JSON.parse(dataNode.textContent || '{}'); } catch (error) { mapData = {}; } if (!panel || !kickerNode || !titleNode || !textNode || !widgets.length) return; board.dataset.mapReady = 'true'; function clearTyping() { if (typingTimer) { window.clearTimeout(typingTimer); typingTimer = null; } panel.classList.remove('is-typing'); } function setWidgetState(key) { Array.prototype.forEach.call(widgets, function (widget) { widget.classList.toggle('is-active', widget.dataset.mapPanel === key); }); } function typeText(text) { var index = 0; var chunkSize = 4; var delay = 12; clearTyping(); textNode.textContent = ''; panel.classList.add('is-typing'); function tick() { index = Math.min(text.length, index + chunkSize); textNode.textContent = text.slice(0, index); if (index < text.length) { typingTimer = window.setTimeout(tick, delay); } else { typingTimer = null; panel.classList.remove('is-typing'); } } tick(); } function activate(key) { var item = mapData[key]; if (!item) return; if (activeKey === key && board.classList.contains('is-open')) return; activeKey = key; board.dataset.active = key; board.classList.add('is-open'); panel.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); kickerNode.textContent = item.kicker || ''; titleNode.textContent = item.title || ''; setWidgetState(key); typeText(item.text || ''); } function reset() { activeKey = ''; clearTyping(); board.classList.remove('is-open'); board.removeAttribute('data-active'); panel.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); kickerNode.textContent = ''; titleNode.textContent = ''; textNode.textContent = ''; setWidgetState(''); } Array.prototype.forEach.call(widgets, function (widget) { var key = widget.dataset.mapPanel; widget.addEventListener('mouseenter', function () { activate(key); }); widget.addEventListener('focus', function () { activate(key); }); }); board.addEventListener('mouseleave', function () { reset(); }); if (closeButton) { closeButton.addEventListener('click', function (event) { event.preventDefault(); reset(); }); } document.addEventListener('keydown', function (event) { if (event.key === 'Escape') reset(); }); } initCareerMap(); document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initCareerMap); document.addEventListener('pjax:complete', initCareerMap);}());

@font-face { font-family: "Ark Pixel 12px Proportional SC"; font-style: normal; font-display: swap; font-weight: 400; src: url("/fonts/ark-pixel-12px-proportional-zh_cn.woff2") format("woff2");}@font-face { font-family: "Ark Pixel 12px Proportional Latin"; font-style: normal; font-display: swap; font-weight: 400; src: url("/fonts/ark-pixel-12px-proportional-latin.woff2") format("woff2");}@font-face { font-family: "Pixelify Sans"; font-style: normal; font-display: swap; font-weight: 400 700; src: url("https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/fontsource/fonts/pixelify-sans:vf@latest/latin-wght-normal.woff2") format("woff2-variations");}@font-face { font-family: "Fusion Pixel 12px Proportional SC"; font-style: normal; font-display: swap; font-weight: 400; src: url("https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/fontsource/fonts/fusion-pixel-12px-proportional-sc@latest/latin-400-normal.woff2") format("woff2"), url("https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/fontsource/fonts/fusion-pixel-12px-proportional-sc@latest/latin-400-normal.woff") format("woff");}:root { --pixel-font: "Ark Pixel 12px Proportional SC", "Fusion Pixel 12px Proportional SC", "Fusion Pixel 12px Proportional zh_hans", "Pixelify Sans", "Zpix", "Minecraft AE", "Microsoft YaHei", monospace; --pixel-font-en: "Pixelify Sans", "Ark Pixel 12px Proportional Latin", "Ark Pixel 12px Proportional SC", "Fusion Pixel 12px Proportional SC", "Zpix", monospace; --pixel-mono: "Ark Pixel 12px Proportional Latin", "Ark Pixel 12px Proportional SC", "Fusion Pixel 12px Proportional SC", "Pixelify Sans", "Courier New", monospace; --pixel-bg: transparent; --pixel-ink: #160f0a; --pixel-paper-ink: #2b1709; --pixel-paper-muted: #4b2b12; --pixel-paper-soft: #d8af69; --pixel-paper-edge: #8a5524; --pixel-gold: #d6a044; --pixel-gold-bright: #ffe08d; --pixel-brass: #a45b22; --pixel-blue: #b9e8ff; --pixel-link: #073852; --pixel-link-hover: #082e43; --pixel-link-visited: #3c1857; --pixel-moss: #7f9d58; --pixel-text: #f8e9b8; --pixel-muted: #cab887; --global-bg: transparent !important; --card-bg: transparent !important; --font-color: var(--pixel-paper-ink); --hr-border: rgba(114, 71, 29, 0.68);}[data-theme="dark"],[data-theme="light"] { --global-bg: transparent !important; --card-bg: transparent !important; --font-color: var(--pixel-paper-ink) !important;}html,body { min-height: 100%; color: var(--pixel-text); background: transparent !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font); letter-spacing: 0.02em; image-rendering: auto;}body,button,input,textarea,select { font-family: var(--pixel-font) !important;}::selection { color: #20150c; background: var(--pixel-gold-bright);}#web_bg { background-position: center center !important; background-size: cover !important; background-attachment: fixed !important; filter: saturate(1.05) contrast(1.05); image-rendering: pixelated;}#web_bg::before,[data-theme="dark"] #web_bg::before { content: "" !important; display: block !important; position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; background: rgba(5, 8, 7, 0.42) !important;}#content-inner,#footer,#page-header:not(.full_page),#nav.show,#web_bg.bg-animation,canvas:not(#ribbon-canvas) { animation: none !important; opacity: 1 !important;}#body-wrap,#content-inner,main.layout,.layout,.page,#recent-posts,.recent-posts,#aside-content,.aside-content { background: transparent !important;}#page-header { image-rendering: pixelated;}#page-header::before { background: transparent !important;}#page-header.full_page #site-info { position: absolute !important; top: 48% !important; left: 50% !important; width: min(96vw, 1100px); transform: translate(-50%, -50%) !important; text-align: center;}#page-header.full_page #site-title { display: block; width: min(92vw, 1040px); aspect-ratio: 2940 / 735; margin: 0 auto; overflow: hidden; color: transparent !important; font-size: 0 !important; line-height: 0; text-shadow: none !important; background: url("/img/pixel-medieval/title-logo-blog-medieval.png") center top / 100% auto no-repeat; filter: drop-shadow(0 10px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.32)) drop-shadow(0 0 18px rgba(255, 217, 121, 0.2)) drop-shadow(0 0 28px rgba(65, 154, 230, 0.3));}#page-header:not(.full_page) #site-title,#page-header #page-site-info #site-title { width: auto; max-width: min(92vw, 1100px); aspect-ratio: auto; margin: 0 auto; color: var(--pixel-gold-bright) !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 5vw, 4.5rem) !important; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.15; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-shadow: 3px 3px 0 #1b0c05, 0 0 14px rgba(255, 195, 87, 0.38) !important; background: none !important; filter: none;}#site-subtitle { display: block !important; width: min(92vw, 860px); min-height: 1.6em; margin: clamp(0.2rem, 1.2vw, 0.85rem) auto 0; color: #fff0b6 !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font) !important; font-size: clamp(1rem, 2.1vw, 1.55rem) !important; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.6; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 #1c0c04, 0 0 12px rgba(255, 202, 97, 0.32) !important;}#site-subtitle .typed-cursor,.typed-cursor { color: var(--pixel-gold-bright) !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 #1c0c04 !important;}#nav { min-height: 58px; border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(225, 171, 76, 0.5); background: rgba(28, 21, 15, 0.72) !important; box-shadow: 0 6px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22); backdrop-filter: blur(2px);}#blog-info .nav-site-title { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 58px;}#blog-info .nav-site-title .site-icon { display: none !important;}#blog-info .nav-site-title .site-name { display: inline-block; width: clamp(154px, 18vw, 220px); height: 56px; overflow: hidden; color: transparent !important; font-size: 0 !important; line-height: 0; text-shadow: none !important; background: url("/img/pixel-medieval/title-logo.png") left center / contain no-repeat; filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.42));}#blog-info .nav-page-title .site-name { width: auto; height: auto; color: var(--pixel-text) !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; font-size: 1rem !important; line-height: 1.2; background: none; filter: none;}#nav a,#nav .site-page,#toggle-menu .site-page,#search-button .site-page { color: var(--pixel-text) !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.82); text-transform: uppercase;}#nav .site-page i,#sidebar-menus .site-page i,#aside-content .item-headline i,#rightside i,#site_social_icons i,.card-info-social-icons i { color: var(--pixel-gold-bright) !important; filter: drop-shadow(2px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.72));}#nav .menus_item span,#sidebar-menus .menus_item span,.article-title,.post-title,#aside-content .item-headline span,.category-list-link,.tag-cloud-list a { font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; font-weight: 700;}#nav .site-page:hover,#sidebar-menus .site-page:hover { color: var(--pixel-gold-bright) !important; transform: translateY(-2px);}#nav .menus_item > a::before,#sidebar-menus .menus_item > a::before { content: ">"; color: var(--pixel-gold); margin-right: 0.35rem; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.18s ease, transform 0.18s ease;}#nav .menus_item > a:hover::before,#sidebar-menus .menus_item > a:hover::before { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(-2px);}.card-announcement .fa-bullhorn::before { content: "\f6e8";}.card-recent-post .fa-history::before { content: "\f70e";}.card-tags .fa-tags::before { content: "\f02e";}.card-webinfo .fa-chart-line::before { content: "\f6d9";}.card-widget,.recent-post-item,#recent-posts > .recent-post-item,#aside-content .card-widget,#post,#page,#archive,#tag,#category,.article-sort,.category-lists,.tag-cloud-list,.search-dialog { color: var(--pixel-paper-ink) !important; border: 3px solid var(--pixel-paper-edge) !important; border-radius: 3px !important; background: rgba(244, 218, 153, 0.9) !important; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #211007, 7px 7px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.32), inset 0 0 0 2px rgba(255, 240, 181, 0.32), inset 0 0 22px rgba(95, 48, 14, 0.16) !important; text-shadow: none !important;}.card-widget::before,.recent-post-item::before,#recent-posts > .recent-post-item::before,#aside-content .card-widget::before,#post::before,#page::before,#archive::before,#tag::before,#category::before,.article-sort::before,.category-lists::before,.tag-cloud-list::before,.search-dialog::before { display: none !important; content: none !important;}.recent-post-item:hover,.card-widget:hover { transform: translate(-2px, -3px); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #211007, 9px 9px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.38), 0 0 18px rgba(255, 199, 91, 0.16), inset 0 0 0 2px rgba(255, 240, 181, 0.34), inset 0 0 22px rgba(95, 48, 14, 0.14) !important;}.recent-post-item:hover::before,.card-widget:hover::before { display: none !important; content: none !important;}.article-title,.category-list-link,.tag-cloud-list a,#aside-content .item-headline span,#aside-content .card-info .author-info-name { color: #5f2a0b !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-shadow: 1px 1px 0 rgba(255, 235, 178, 0.85), 2px 2px 0 rgba(55, 24, 7, 0.28) !important;}.article-title { font-size: clamp(1.35rem, 2.2vw, 2.2rem) !important;}#post-info .post-title,.post-title { color: var(--pixel-gold-bright) !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.07em; text-shadow: 3px 3px 0 #160a04, 0 0 12px rgba(255, 198, 82, 0.44) !important;}.article-title:hover,.category-list-link:hover,.tag-cloud-list a:hover { color: #381d08 !important;}.article-meta-wrap,.post-meta,.post-meta-date,.content,#article-container,#aside-content,.announcement_content,.site-data,.local-search-input input,#local-search-results { color: var(--pixel-paper-ink) !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font) !important; text-shadow: none !important;}#article-container a:not(.headerlink),.post-content a:not(.headerlink) { color: var(--pixel-link) !important; border-bottom: 2px dotted rgba(21, 80, 106, 0.72); background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 58%, rgba(185, 232, 255, 0.34) 58% 86%, transparent 86%); font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none !important; text-shadow: 1px 1px 0 rgba(255, 239, 183, 0.86) !important;}#article-container a:not(.headerlink):visited,.post-content a:not(.headerlink):visited { color: var(--pixel-link-visited) !important; border-bottom-color: rgba(91, 50, 122, 0.68); background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 58%, rgba(214, 188, 255, 0.28) 58% 86%, transparent 86%);}#article-container a:not(.headerlink):hover,.post-content a:not(.headerlink):hover { color: var(--pixel-link-hover) !important; border-bottom-color: var(--pixel-link-hover); background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 48%, rgba(132, 218, 255, 0.48) 48% 88%, transparent 88%);}#aside-content a,.site-data a,.aside-list .title,.toc-link,#local-search-results a,.search-dialog a { color: #3a210d !important; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none !important; text-shadow: none !important;}#aside-content a:hover,.site-data a:hover,.aside-list .title:hover,.toc-link:hover,#local-search-results a:hover,.search-dialog a:hover { color: var(--pixel-link) !important;}.article-meta-wrap,.post-meta,.article-meta-label,.post-meta-label,.post-meta-separator { color: var(--pixel-paper-muted) !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.06em;}#post-meta,#post-meta a,#post-meta .post-meta-label,#post-meta .post-meta-separator { color: #fff2bc !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 rgba(8, 7, 5, 0.78) !important;}.article-meta-wrap i,#post-meta .post-meta-icon { color: var(--pixel-blue) !important; margin-inline: 0.22rem; text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 rgba(8, 7, 5, 0.78) !important;}.article-meta-wrap .fa-calendar-alt::before,#post-meta .fa-calendar-alt::before { content: "\f70e"; font-family: "Font Awesome 6 Free", "Font Awesome 5 Free"; font-weight: 900;}.article-meta-wrap .fa-history::before,#post-meta .fa-history::before,#post-meta .fa-clock::before { content: "\f252"; font-family: "Font Awesome 6 Free", "Font Awesome 5 Free"; font-weight: 900;}.article-meta-wrap .fa-inbox::before,#post-meta .fa-inbox::before { content: "\f518"; font-family: "Font Awesome 6 Free", "Font Awesome 5 Free"; font-weight: 900;}#post-meta .fa-file-word::before { content: "\f56b"; font-family: "Font Awesome 6 Free", "Font Awesome 5 Free"; font-weight: 900;}.article-meta-separator,.post-meta-separator { color: #9a622c !important;}#aside-content .item-headline,.search-nav { border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(127, 75, 27, 0.36);}#aside-content .item-headline span,.search-dialog-title,.site-data .headline { text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em;}#aside-content .card-info img,.avatar-img img { border: 3px solid var(--pixel-gold); border-radius: 2px !important; background: var(--pixel-ink); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--pixel-ink), 5px 5px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.42); image-rendering: pixelated;}#card-info-btn,.btn,.button,.pagination .page-number,.pagination .extend,#pagination .page-number,#pagination .extend,.tk-submit-action-icon,button { color: #1a1008 !important; border: 2px solid #f1d28a !important; border-radius: 2px !important; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f1d28a, #a97938) !important; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #20150c, 4px 4px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.42) !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-shadow: none !important;}#card-info-btn:hover,.btn:hover,.button:hover,.pagination .page-number:hover,.pagination .extend:hover,button:hover { transform: translate(-1px, -2px); filter: brightness(1.08);}#article-container { line-height: 1.92;}#article-container h1,#article-container h2,#article-container h3,#article-container h4 { color: #4f2108 !important; border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(130, 76, 29, 0.38); font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-shadow: 1px 1px 0 rgba(255, 235, 178, 0.88), 2px 2px 0 rgba(55, 24, 7, 0.22) !important;}#article-container h1::before,#article-container h2::before,#article-container h3::before { color: var(--pixel-brass) !important;}#article-container blockquote { color: #321a0b; border-left: 5px solid var(--pixel-brass); border-radius: 2px; background: rgba(255, 232, 173, 0.42); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px rgba(116, 66, 20, 0.18);}#article-container code,pre,figure.highlight { border: 2px solid rgba(136, 85, 35, 0.58); border-radius: 2px !important; background: rgba(32, 20, 12, 0.88) !important; color: #ffe6a4 !important; font-family: var(--pixel-mono) !important;}hr { border: 0; height: 8px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0 8px, var(--pixel-paper-edge) 8px 16px, transparent 16px 24px) repeat-x; background-size: 24px 8px;}#rightside > div > button,#rightside > div > a { border: 2px solid var(--pixel-gold) !important; border-radius: 2px !important; background: rgba(35, 25, 15, 0.78) !important; box-shadow: 3px 3px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45);}#rightside { opacity: 0.9 !important; transform: translate(-58px, 0) !important;}.local-search-input input { border: 2px solid rgba(117, 72, 29, 0.58) !important; border-radius: 2px !important; background: rgba(255, 232, 174, 0.54) !important;}#footer { border-top: 4px solid rgba(107, 86, 52, 0.86); background: url("/img/pixel-medieval/grassland-layout.png") center bottom / cover no-repeat !important;}#page:has(.adventure-map-page) { padding: 0 !important; border: 0 !important; background: transparent !important; box-shadow: none !important;}#page:has(.adventure-map-page)::before { display: none !important; content: none !important;}#page:has(.adventure-map-page) > .page-title { display: none !important;}#article-container .adventure-map-page { color: var(--pixel-text); font-family: var(--pixel-font) !important; line-height: 1.55;}.adventure-map-page * { box-sizing: border-box;}.map-hero { margin: 0 auto 1.2rem; padding: clamp(1rem, 3vw, 1.6rem); border: 3px solid #6e461e; border-radius: 3px; background: rgba(30, 22, 14, 0.78); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #140c06, 7px 7px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.34), inset 0 0 0 2px rgba(255, 220, 126, 0.16); text-align: center;}.map-kicker { margin: 0 0 0.35rem !important; align-items: center; gap: 0.7rem; padding: 0.68rem 0.9rem; border-bottom: 3px solid #4b3320; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(88, 72, 53, 0.9), rgba(35, 29, 24, 0.92));}.rpg-back-mark,.rpg-class-badge { border: 2px solid #d9bd75; border-radius: 3px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #7d6849, #4a3928); box-shadow: 3px 3px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);}.rpg-back-mark { display: grid; width: 48px; height: 34px; place-items: center; color: #fff2bc;}.rpg-card-heading { color: #fff2bc; font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; font-size: clamp(1.05rem, 2vw, 1.55rem); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 #080604;}.rpg-class-badge { padding: 0.32rem 0.62rem; color: #fff4c6; font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; font-size: 0.78rem; text-transform: uppercase;}.rpg-profile-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(250px, 0.9fr) minmax(280px, 1.1fr); grid-template-areas: "stats portrait" "talent skills"; gap: 1rem; padding: clamp(0.9rem, 2vw, 1.25rem);}.rpg-stat-column { grid-area: stats; min-width: 0;}.rpg-stat-column h1 { margin: 0 0 0.25rem !important; border: 0 !important; color: #fff4c6 !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font) !important; font-size: clamp(1.65rem, 3.4vw, 2.45rem) !important; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-shadow: 3px 3px 0 #120802, 0 0 16px rgba(255, 198, 82, 0.36) !important;}.rpg-stat-column h1::before { display: none !important; content: none !important;}.rpg-name-subtitle { margin: 0.25rem 0 0.5rem !important; color: #d9c18a; font-size: 0.95rem;}.rpg-stars { margin: 0.28rem 0 0.8rem; color: var(--pixel-gold-bright); font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; font-size: 1.18rem; text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 #160c06;}.rpg-stats { display: grid; gap: 0.34rem; margin: 0;}.rpg-stats div { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 4.5rem 1fr; align-items: center; min-height: 32px; padding: 0.22rem 0.45rem; border: 2px solid rgba(111, 75, 37, 0.7); background: rgba(14, 10, 8, 0.52);}.rpg-stats dt { color: #d8b765; font-weight: 700;}.rpg-stats dd { margin: 0; color: #fff4c6; font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; font-weight: 700;}.rpg-portrait-strip { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.45rem; margin-top: 0.8rem;}.rpg-portrait-strip span,.stage-tag-list span,.rpg-skill-grid span { border: 2px solid #73502a; border-radius: 3px; background: rgba(241, 210, 138, 0.13); color: #ffe9ae; box-shadow: 3px 3px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28); font-family: var(--pixel-font) !important; font-weight: 700;}.rpg-portrait-strip span { padding: 0.22rem 0.5rem; font-size: 0.86rem;}.rpg-portrait-card { grid-area: portrait; display: grid; align-content: center; justify-items: center; min-height: 440px; padding: 1rem; border: 4px solid #d9d2b4; border-radius: 18px; background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 42%, rgba(205, 141, 35, 0.42), transparent 37%), repeating-conic-gradient(from 0deg, rgba(255, 218, 101, 0.08) 0 8deg, transparent 8deg 18deg), linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(109, 73, 15, 0.86), rgba(22, 16, 10, 0.94)); box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px #130b05, inset 0 0 0 3px rgba(255, 238, 191, 0.25), inset 0 -42px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.24);}.rpg-avatar-frame { display: grid; width: min(52%, 220px); aspect-ratio: 1; place-items: center; border: 4px solid #221309; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255, 230, 134, 0.22), transparent 58%), rgba(22, 15, 9, 0.88); box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px #d9bd75, 0 10px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.36);}.rpg-avatar-frame img { width: 82%; height: 82%; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 50%; image-rendering: pixelated;}.rpg-role { margin: 1rem 0 0.25rem !important; color: #fff4c6; font-weight: 700;}.rpg-power { margin: 0 !important; color: #ff8d4a; font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 3vw, 2.2rem); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 #310f05, 0 0 12px rgba(255, 127, 58, 0.4);}.rpg-talent-card,.rpg-skill-card { min-height: 220px; padding: 0.95rem; border: 3px solid #5f4427; border-radius: 4px; background: rgba(28, 21, 17, 0.84); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px rgba(255, 226, 151, 0.12);}.rpg-talent-card { grid-area: talent; text-align: center;}.rpg-skill-card { grid-area: skills;}.rpg-talent-card h2,.rpg-skill-card h2 { margin: 0 0 0.8rem !important; border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(224, 184, 97, 0.42) !important; color: #fff4c6 !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font) !important; font-size: 1.25rem !important;}.rpg-talent-card h2::before,.rpg-skill-card h2::before { display: none !important; content: none !important;}.rpg-talent-icon { display: grid; width: 74px; height: 74px; margin: 0.8rem auto 0.65rem; place-items: center; border: 3px solid #f1d28a; border-radius: 8px; background: radial-gradient(circle, #4f4f4f, #111); color: var(--pixel-gold-bright); font-size: 2rem; box-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(255, 199, 91, 0.4), 4px 4px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.42);}.rpg-talent-card p { margin: 0.25rem 0 !important; color: #fff4c6; font-weight: 700;}.rpg-talent-card span { color: #d8b765; font-size: 0.85rem;}.rpg-skill-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 0.7rem;}.rpg-skill-grid span { display: grid; min-height: 68px; place-items: center; padding: 0.42rem; text-align: center;}.rpg-skill-grid i { display: block; color: var(--pixel-gold-bright); font-size: 1.35rem; margin-bottom: 0.22rem; filter: drop-shadow(2px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.68));}.about-map-section { margin-top: 1.2rem;}.career-stage-page { padding-bottom: 1rem;}#article-container .stage-back-link,#article-container .stage-back-link:visited,#article-container .map-redirect-link,#article-container .map-redirect-link:visited { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.45rem; margin: 0 0 0.9rem; padding: 0.42rem 0.65rem; border: 2px solid #f1d28a !important; border-radius: 3px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #7c5930, #3a2414) !important; color: #fff2bc !important; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.38); font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none !important; text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 #120802 !important;}.stage-hero { margin-bottom: 1rem; padding: clamp(1rem, 2.5vw, 1.45rem);}.stage-kicker,.map-redirect-card .map-kicker { margin: 0 0 0.35rem !important; color: #b9e8ff; font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase;}.stage-hero h1,.map-redirect-card h1 { margin: 0 0 0.65rem !important; border: 0 !important; color: var(--pixel-gold-bright) !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font) !important; font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 4vw, 2.5rem) !important; text-shadow: 3px 3px 0 #120802, 0 0 18px rgba(255, 196, 86, 0.32) !important;}.stage-hero h1::before,.map-redirect-card h1::before { display: none !important; content: none !important;}.stage-hero p,.map-redirect-card p { margin: 0 !important; color: #ffe9ae; line-height: 1.68; text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.58);}.stage-layout { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(230px, 300px) minmax(0, 1fr); gap: 1rem; align-items: start;}.stage-side-card { position: sticky; top: 78px; padding: 0.85rem; text-align: center;}.stage-side-card img { display: block; width: min(86%, 220px); margin: 0 auto 0.65rem; image-rendering: pixelated; filter: drop-shadow(5px 7px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.38));}.stage-side-card h2 { margin: 0.3rem 0 !important; border: 0 !important; color: #fff4c6 !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font) !important; font-size: 1.3rem !important;}.stage-side-card h2::before,.quest-card h2::before { display: none !important; content: none !important;}.stage-side-card p { margin: 0 0 0.75rem !important; color: #d8b765; font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; font-weight: 700;}.stage-tag-list { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; gap: 0.45rem;}.stage-tag-list span { padding: 0.18rem 0.45rem; font-size: 0.78rem;}.stage-main { display: grid; gap: 1rem; min-width: 0;}.quest-card { padding: clamp(0.9rem, 2vw, 1.15rem);}.quest-card h2 { margin: 0 0 0.65rem !important; color: #fff4c6 !important; border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(224, 184, 97, 0.4) !important; font-family: var(--pixel-font) !important; font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 2vw, 1.38rem) !important;}.quest-card h2 i { color: var(--pixel-gold-bright); margin-right: 0.42rem;}.quest-card p { margin: 0.45rem 0 !important; color: #fff0b6; line-height: 1.72;}.quest-list { display: grid; gap: 0.75rem;}.quest-list article { padding: 0.65rem 0.75rem; border: 2px solid rgba(115, 80, 42, 0.72); background: rgba(14, 10, 8, 0.36);}.quest-list strong { color: #fff4c6; font-size: 1.05rem;}.quest-list span { float: right; color: #d8b765; font-family: var(--pixel-font-en) !important; font-weight: 700;}.quest-list p { clear: both;}.stage-student .stage-hero,.stage-student .quest-card,.stage-student .stage-side-card { border-color: #809f48;}.stage-intern .stage-hero,.stage-intern .quest-card,.stage-intern .stage-side-card { border-color: #777f68;}.stage-work .stage-hero,.stage-work .quest-card,.stage-work .stage-side-card { border-color: #8b4a63;}.map-redirect-page { display: grid; min-height: 48vh; place-items: center;}.map-redirect-card { width: min(720px, 100%); padding: clamp(1rem, 3vw, 1.6rem); text-align: center;}.map-redirect-link { margin: 1rem auto 0 !important;}@media (max-width: 900px) { .rpg-profile-grid, .stage-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .rpg-profile-grid { grid-template-areas: "portrait" "stats" "talent" "skills"; } .rpg-portrait-card { min-height: 320px; } .rpg-skill-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); } .stage-side-card { position: static; }}@media (max-width: 560px) { .rpg-resource-bar { grid-template-columns: 1fr; text-align: left; } .rpg-card-header { grid-template-columns: auto 1fr; } .rpg-class-badge { grid-column: 1 / -1; width: max-content; } .rpg-skill-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .quest-list span { float: none; display: block; margin-top: 0.18rem; }}

entry.title: Adventure Map
entry.content:
Quest Moved

Adventure Map 已迁移

职业冒险地图现在放在 About 页面中，地图上的三个区域会跳转到更具体的经历篇章。

进入 About 地图

entry.title: 学生时代
entry.content:
Back to Adventure Map

Village of First Quests

学生时代 · 冒险镇的第一批任务

这段时期的关键词是“快速试作”和“从想法到可玩的落地”：Unity、UE5、Kinect、Photon、技术美术和团队协作都从这里开始成型。

学生时代

2018.09 - 2022.06

UnityUE5PhotonKinectGameplayToonShader

厦门大学

数字媒体技术本科，专业排名 17/69，GPA 3.38。课程包括游戏设计导论、计算机图形学、游戏关卡设计、网络游戏设计。

在校期间参与游戏比赛和课程项目，强调代码能力、软件上手速度、个人表达、审美与团队配合。

代表项目

《蜀道行》2021.11 - 2022.05

UE5 毕设，主程 / TA。负责相机逻辑、机关陷阱、传送阵、可拾取物、怪物巡逻、死亡重生、屏幕变暗后处理等。

《Seizer》2021.08

72 小时单人 ARPG 项目，负责玩法设计、怪物动画状态、生成逻辑、传送门、昼夜系统、判定、燃烧/激光表现、水面与 ToonShader。

《Mochi War》2021.04 - 2021.06

多人联机派对游戏，担任主程与主策。负责 Photon 框架、UI 逻辑、游戏流程逻辑和场景效果调整，并带队获得比赛初赛第一名。

《Connection》2020.09 - 2020.12

负责 Unity 天气系统光照模拟、小镇拟真、泡泡跟随变色、Kinect 骨骼追踪和后处理效果。

社团与组织

厦门大学游戏研发协会创始人 / 管理层，组织游戏制作分享、活动联动与研发交流；也曾参加吉他社巡演活动。

entry.title: 实习阶段
entry.content:
Back to Adventure Map

Forest Mine Trial

实习阶段 · 森林矿谷的工程试炼

这一阶段像进入矿谷打磨工具：从小功能优化、性能定位，到 UE4 客户端工程实践，重点是理解成熟项目并把问题拆成可验证的工程任务。

实习阶段

2020.07 - 2021.09

UE4 GASC++AIProfilerFairyGUIORCA

福州境界信息

2020.07 - 2020.08｜实习游戏程序

负责小游戏功能优化与算法思路优化，包括 isometric 视角遮挡关系拓扑排序、单例模式、有限状态机原型和具体算法实现。

盛趣信息技术（上海）

2021.01 - 2021.04｜性能优化实习生

阅读《Don't Starve: New Home》工程项目，通过 Profiler 定位性能消耗点；分析 FairyGUI 在 Unity 中 AB 包加载卸载对内存的影响；尝试定位内存泄漏，并用动画状态机图结构保存近结点、卸载远结点来优化动画占用。

腾讯天美实习

2021.06 - 2021.09｜游戏客户端程序

学习 UE4 GAS、AI 系统以及 C++ 与 UE4 的联合开发；复现《Optimal Reciprocal Collision Avoidance》底层避障论文，把论文能力转化为可运行的工程验证。

entry.title: 工作阶段
entry.content:
Back to Adventure Map

Demon Castle Campaign

工作阶段 · 魔王城堡的线上战役

工作阶段更像多人副本：既要接线上系统，也要深入引擎渲染、工具链和性能调试。主要方向覆盖游戏客户端、引擎开发、Gameplay、UGC 与移动端适配。

工作阶段

2022.08 - Now

C++HLSLRenderDocRHISSAOUGCGameplay

ZERO Game

2022.08 - 2023.12｜腾讯天美工作室群 · 游戏引擎开发

参与废土风日式冷兵器动作游戏。主要开发内容包括 FFT 海水 Meshing、Shading Model 定制、Projected Grid、SSAO 优化、后处理体积与场景组件关联变化、双端双 Pass 渲染支持、移动端后处理、草地植被 ShadingModels、美术材质工具，以及部分 Gameplay 接入。

元梦之星

2023.12 - 2024.06｜游戏客户端开发

负责涂鸦派对手游 UGC 副玩法移植，将副玩法内容接入 UGC 框架，实现 UGC 模式下副玩法兼容与支持，迁移道具生成器、UGC 掉落物和相关功能。

PartyGame 品类

2024.06 - 2025.09｜腾讯光子工作室群 · 客户端开发

参与多人联机派对项目，负责玩法、系统和工具链相关内容：物理交互物件、地图系统、背包、多端物理真实与背包功能、机型适配、自动化客户端测试机器人、跑图效能工具、协同 NPC、引擎升级流水线、搜打撤玩法基建、家园玩法交互、独立箱庭关卡、红点系统和网页拉起移动端链接平台。

养成类小游戏

2025.11 - 至今｜与朋友合伙开发

负责简单三消合成以及系统设计与实现，继续积累独立玩法原型和轻量化产品闭环经验。
